THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF WINSTON & STRAWN LLP RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SUNLINK CORPORATION, A DELAWARE CORPORATION $2,597,910.29 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,597,910.29, SEE SCANNED DOC
PROOF OF SERVICE (FOR REJECTION OF AWARD; REQUEST FOR TRIAL) (TRANSACTION ID # 16363027) FILED BY DEFENDANT SUNLINK CORPORATION, A DELAWARE CORPORATION
MINI MINUTES FOR FEB-17-2017 09:30 AM FOR DEPT 302

LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF WINSTON & STRAWN LLP'S PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD, IS GRANTED. DEFENDANT SUNLINK CORPORATION'S UNTIMELY REQUEST TO REJECT THE AWARD IS A NULLITY. AS STATED IN GIORGIANNI V. CROWLEY (2011) 197 CAL. APP. 4TH 1462, 1473: "ABSENT THE FILING OF A TIMELY REJECTION AND REQUEST FOR TRIAL, THE ARBITRATION AWARD BECOMES FINAL. ONCE THE AWARD HAS BECOME FINAL, IT CANNOT BE VACATED BY THE FILING OF A MOTION FOR RELIEF FROM DEFAULT UNDER CODE OF CIVIL PROCEDURE SECTION 473." (CITATION AND FOOTNOTE OMITTED). ORDER AND JUDGMENT SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN; CLERK: FELICIA GREEN; COURT REPORTER: CAROL KAREN, CSR NO. 8189, EMAIL: CKAREN@SFTC.ORG; DEPT. 302.
ORDER GRANTING WINSTON & STRAWN LLP'S PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF APR-05-2017 IS OFF CALENDAR. JUDGMENT ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-20-2017 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-10-2017 Continued To Apr-05-17 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Plaintiff Winston & Strawn Llp'S Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award
Off Calendar Feb-17-2017 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Raquel Mason, of Winston & Straun LLP, Tel. 415.591.1567, for plaintiffs;
No other appearances.

Ruling: The matter was not argued. The Court adopts its tentative ruling. Plaintiff Winston & Strawn LLP's Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award is granted. Defendant Sunlink Corporation's untimely request to reject the award is a nullity. As stated in Giorgianni v. Crowley (2011) 197 Cal. App. 4th 1462, 1473: "Absent the filing of a timely rejection and request for trial, the arbitration award becomes final. Once the award has become final, it cannot be vacated by the filing of a motion for relief from default under Code of Civil Procedure section 473." (citation and footnote omitted). Order and judgment signed in open court. Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Felicia Green; Court Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR No. 8189, email: ckaren@sftc.org; Dept. 302.

Notice Of Hearing On Winston And Strawn Llps Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities In Support Thereof
Off Calendar Feb-07-2017 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances in the matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling. PLAINTIFF WINSTON & STRAWN LLP's Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award is CONTINUED to February 17, 2017, at 9:30 AM, in Department 302, per the agreement of the parties. Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Felicia Green; Court Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR No. 8189, email: ckaren@sftc.org; Dept. 302.
